gap_summaries.description: Missing §8 Module 3 invariants category — DG/ADR semgrep runner and invariants feed to adjudicator not implemented
gap_summaries.fix: Added invariant_check.py + invariants.py collector module (2 collectors) + tests + registry wiring

gap_summaries.description: No integration test coverage for invariants category pipeline
gap_summaries.fix: Extended SecurityCategoryPipelineTests to include invariants category with mock collector

gap_summaries.description: Weak assertTrue/assertFalse assertions on validate_sbom return values
gap_summaries.fix: Replaced with assertEqual(ok, True/False) + assertIn on message content

gap_summaries.description: Weak assertion assertTrue(len(files) > 0) on provenance default files
gap_summaries.fix: Replaced with assertEqual(len(files), 2) matching known default list size

production_review.notes: Library artifact type. All check scripts use subprocess.run with list args (no shell injection). All external calls have FileNotFoundError + TimeoutExpired + returncode handling. No secrets, no TODOs. Single-user threat model applies.
